narration: What if I told you that your cells have a hidden power plant?

narration: This power plant is the electron transport chain, a crucial step in how our cells generate energy.
visual_description: Context visual: This power plant is the electron transport chain, a crucial step in how our cells generate energy.

narration: Electrons from food molecules travel through a series of proteins, creating energy as they go.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Electrons from food molecules travel through a series of proteins, creating energy as they go.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Electrons from food molecules travel through a series of proteins, creating energy as they go.

narration: This process also produces water and ATP, the energy currency of life.
